reviews.comment:

The shopping center looks like a ghost town, with very few varieties of merchandise. Since it's a fairly large market, it could be more lively inside.

reviews.comment:
Es el lugar de parada obligaroria cuando vas de Mar del a Baires y viceversa. La estación tiene de todo. Lo único que variaría del lugar son las medialunas. Son congeladas y no tienen sabor. El resto es aceptable.
Acepta todos los medios de pago. Descuento para socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop when traveling between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires. The station has everything you could possibly need. The only thing that doesn't compare is the croissants. They're frozen and tasteless. Everything else is acceptable. They accept all forms of payment. Discount for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtamUteS1RRRAB
